name: @ai-video/app-desktop
description: Electron-based tabbed browser shell for AI Video Pipeline — integrates automation pages as tabs instead of separate windows. Physically moved from top-level browser-shell/ in direction A-3.

scripts.build: tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && mv dist/apps/desktop/src/preload.js dist/apps/desktop/src/preload.cjs && mv dist/apps/desktop/src/stealth-preload.js dist/apps/desktop/src/stealth-preload.cjs && mkdir -p dist/apps/desktop/src/renderer && cp -R src/renderer/. dist/apps/desktop/src/renderer/
